JavaScript and HTML files for power profiling visualization using Dygraph, and an MIT License file.


## Files
- **[dygraph-combined.js](dygraph-combined.js.md)**: A JavaScript file for the Dygraph library, implementing graph rendering, interaction, and customization features for power profiling in the Pebble firmware.
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: MIT License for the pebble-firmware power profiling tools.
- **[plot_power.html](plot_power.html.md)**: HTML file for visualizing power profiling data using Dygraph with a CSV input.
